| `shutdown` | Tears down bootstrap chat & both endpoints, fails closed |

| `own_node_identity` | Builds `NodeIdentity` pairing user + own node pubkey |
| `user` | Returns user identity (nickname, user id) |

| `bs_global_chat_controller` | Clones bootstrap node's global-chat controller |

| `user_identity` | Returns our user identity |
| `bootstrap_nodes_set` | Collects all known bootstrap node IDs (both keys) into deduped set |
| `own_endpoint` | Clones own iroh `Endpoint` if main node running |
| `own_node` | Clones own `MainNode` if running |
| `bs_node` | Clones bootstrap node's `MainNode` if hosting

content.text:
Done. All 19 `missing documentation` warnings for `global_matchmaker.rs` have been eliminated. The crate compiles successfully with no new warnings.

**Summary of changes:**
- Added **module-level doc** (`//!`) at the top of the file
- Added `///` docstrings to all 19 public items that were warned:

| Item | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `sleep` | Interruptible sleep via shared `SleepManager` |
| `shutdown` | Tears down bootstrap chat & both endpoints, fails closed |
| `user_secrets` | Shared handle to user's signing identity secrets |
| `own_node_identity` | Builds `NodeIdentity` pairing user + own node pubkey |
| `user` | Returns user identity (nickname, user id) |
| `global_chat_controller` | Clones client-side global-chat controller |
| `bs_global_chat_controller` | Clones bootstrap node's global-chat controller |
| `display_debug_info` | Human-readable debug summary (user, node IDs, peers, bootstrap nodes) |
| `user_identity` | Returns our user identity |
| `bootstrap_nodes_set` | Collects all known bootstrap node IDs (both keys) into deduped set |
| `own_endpoint` | Clones own iroh `Endpoint` if main node running |
| `own_node` | Clones own `MainNode` if running |
| `bs_node` | Clones bootstrap node's `MainNode` if hosting one |
| `bs_endpoint` | Clones bootstrap node's iroh `Endpoint` if hosting one |
| `new` (associated) | Creates matchmaker with default config, 3 retries |
| `new_with_config` (associated) | Creates matchmaker with custom `NetworkManagerConfig`, 3 retries |
| `get_global_chat_ticket` | Builds global-chat ticket from current bootstrap node set |
| `known_bootstrap_nodes` | Returns full `BTreeMap` of known bootstrap nodes |
| `spawn_bootstrap_endpoint` | Spawns new bootstrap endpoint if slot free; returns whether spawned + unique |

The pre-existing 131 total missing-doc warnings across the crate are unchanged (they were in other files).
